name: distObjContainerRef::Create
title: distObjContainerRef::Create
syntax: long distObjContainerRef <Typedef name>::Create(dword index, distObjBlueprint <Interface> blueprint);
description: Creates a new object at the given index.
It requires that <Typedef name> refers to an object array type.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index at which to create the object.

parameters.name: blueprint
parameters.description: Blueprint which is used for object creation.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
